results.title: How to Write a Product Requirements Document - Create PRD | Free Notion Template
results.reason: Best overall match for beginners, offering a structured template and clear explanation of the document's purpose in a concise format.
summary: Learn the basic parts of a product document
Understand how to define goals and user needs
Follow a step by step guide using Notion
Get a free template to start writing quickly

results.title: How to Use Notion - Beginner Tutorial (Free Templates)
results.reason: High popularity and clear focus on Notion basics make it accessible, though it lacks specific PRD-focused depth for product managers.
summary: Learn how to set up your first workspace
Understand how to use blocks and pages
Discover how to organize your daily tasks
Find out how to use free pre-made templates

results.title: How to write a Product Requirement Document (PRD) : Guide to great PRDs with Live Example
results.reason: The 'Live Example' approach is highly praised in comments for bridging the gap between theory and practice for new PMs.
summary: See a real example of a product plan
Learn how to explain features to developers
Understand how to measure a project's success
Follow a simple structure for clear writing

results.title: Webinar: How to Write Great Product Requirements by Amazon Sr PM, Elly Newell
results.reason: High-authority content from an Amazon PM that provides deep industry context, though the webinar format is longer than other tutorials.
summary: Learn how experts at Amazon plan products
Understand how to focus on the customer first
Discover tips for writing clear and simple goals
Learn how to share your ideas with teams

results.title: Build Better Apps with AI Using This One Simple Document (PRD Guide)
results.reason: Strong focus on the 'why' behind documentation for AI development, though slightly more advanced than a general beginner template.
summary: Learn to use AI to build better apps
Understand how to write instructions for AI tools
Discover how to speed up your planning process
Follow a simple guide for modern app design
